load_resource_packs.//: Determines if OpenLoader should load resource packs.

load_data_packs.//: Determines if OpenLoader should load data packs.

//: OpenLoader 21.1.5 ships with this list empty by default and only scans
config/openloader/packs/, which the modpack does not populate. The
modpack puts bundled resource packs in openloader/resources/ and
datapacks in openloader/data/, so list both paths here so they are auto-
loaded at boot without the player having to enable anything manually.
Some launchers like CurseForge install data packs to the datapacks folder
(.minecraft/datapacks). When enabled, OpenLoader will always check that folder
